outputs.description: The ID of the investigation. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.scanSummaryGuid The GUID of the investigation.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.scanSummaryId

outputs.description: Status of the investigation. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.statusForUI Status of the investigation shown in the web console.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.status

outputs.description: Method used for the investigation. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.submitTime Date
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.scanType

outputs.description: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.finishTime Date Date and time when the investigation was finished.
outputs.name: Date and time when the investigation was submitted.

outputs.description: Indicates how targets were selected for the investigation. 0-All, 1-Specific. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.safeCount Number of agents with "No match" status.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.specificAgentType

outputs.description: Number of agents with "Matched" status. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.pendingCount Number of agents with "Pending" status.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.riskCount

outputs.description: Number of agents with "Timeout" status. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.noneCount Number of agents with "None" status.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.timeoutCount

outputs.description: Number of agents with "Processing" status. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.errorCount Number of agents with errors.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.processingCount

outputs.description: Number of aborted agents. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.connectionFailCount Number of agents that fail to connect.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.progressInfo.abortCount

outputs.description: The name of the investigation. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.agentCount The number of agents in the investigation.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.name

outputs.description: The number of matched agents in the investigation. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.serverGuidList Trend Micro GUID list of the servers.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.matchedAgentCount

outputs.description: The name of the user who created the investigation. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.scanCriteriaEntity.criteriaId Unique identifier used by the server to store the criteria.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.creator

outputs.description: The name of the criteria. TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.scanCriteriaEntity.criteriaContent The the criteria used to perform "registry" investigation.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.scanCriteriaEntity.criteriaName

outputs.description: Error response if server communication is unsuccessful.
outputs.name: TrendMicroApex.InvestigationResult.errorServers
